summary: The user sought assistance in tracking shoe maintenance and wear, specifically for their black boots. They decided to set up a digital Shoe Wear Log spreadsheet to monitor their shoe usage and maintenance needs, starting with their black boots, which they have worn five times since purchasing them on February 10th.
facts: The user has black boots that they purchased on February 10th. The user has worn their black boots 5 times since buying them. The user decided to use Method 2: Shoe Wear Log to track their shoe wear. The user plans to add existing shoe wear data to their Shoe Wear Log spreadsheet. The user is tracking their shoe maintenance to ensure they are not over-wearing certain pairs. The user prefers a digital reminder on their phone for shoe maintenance tasks. The user is interested in maintaining their shoes properly to extend their lifespan. The user is using a spreadsheet program to create their Shoe Wear Log.
